content: Hiring policy for Python Intern: minimum CGPA of 7.0, candidates preferred from tier1 and tier2 colleges, stipend range ₹15,000-₹25,000/month, typical process is Resume Screening, Online Assessment, Technical Interview, then HR Interview, with an average time-to-hire of 12 days.

Hiring policy for Frontend Developer: minimum CGPA of 6.5, open to all college tiers given the emphasis on portfolio quality, stipend range ₹18,000-₹28,000/month, typical process is Resume Screening, Portfolio Review, Technical Interview, then HR Interview, with an average time-to-hire of 10 days.

Hiring policy for Data Analyst: minimum CGPA of 6.5, open to all college tiers, stipend range ₹12,000-₹20,000/month, typical process is Resume Screening, Online Assessment, Case Study Interview, then HR Interview, with an average time-to-hire of 9 days.

Hiring policy for AI/ML Intern: minimum CGPA of 7.5, candidates preferred from tier1 and tier2 colleges given the research-oriented nature of the role, stipend range ₹20,000-₹35,000/month, typical process is Resume Screening, Online Assessment, Technical Interview, Project Discussion, then HR Interview, with an average time-to-hire of 15 days, the longest of the five roles.

Hiring policy for Software Engineer Intern: minimum CGPA of 7.0, candidates preferred from tier1 and tier2 colleges, stipend range ₹20,000-₹30,000/month, typical process is Resume Screening, Online Assessment, two Technical Interview rounds, then HR Interview, with an average time-to-hire of 14 days.
